description: A lab technician has opened a new bottle of a chemical reagent and needs to log it in the lab's inventory system.

nodes.task_description: Scan the barcode on the reagent bottle to identify it.
Enter the date the bottle was opened.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent records the 'date opened' in the system.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically calculates the new expiration date based on the 'in-use' stability period (e.g., 6 months after opening) and prints a new label.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets a new label with the correct in-use expiration date to place on the bottle.
